```shell
  GENERATE=$(cat << EOF
  {
  "synchronizer" : $SYNCHRONIZER_ID,
  "partyHint" : "Alice",
  "publicKey" : {
  "format" : "CRYPTO_KEY_FORMAT_DER_X509_SUBJECT_PUBLIC_KEY_INFO",
  "keyData": "$PUBLIC_KEY_BASE64",
  "keySpec" : "SIGNING_KEY_SPEC_EC_CURVE25519"
  },
  "otherConfirmingParticipantUids" : []
  }
  EOF
  )
```
